title: LEGO Star Wars 75389 The Dark Falcon - Play and Display Building Toy with Spring-Loaded Shooters, Cannons & 6 Minifigures incl. C-3PO - Gift for 10+ Year Old Boys & Adult Fans
features: Star Wars building toy for kids – This LEGO Star Wars set features the Dark Falcon, a dark version of the Millennium Falcon as seen in the Rebuild the Galaxy Disney+ special
6 LEGO Star Wars minifigures – Darth Jar Jar, Bounty Hunter C-3PO, Darth Dev, Darth Rey, Beach Luke and Jedi Vader, plus lightsabers and more
LEGO Star Wars vehicle – Features a removable cockpit for 2 minifigures, spring-loaded shooters, cannons, a gunner post for 2 minifigures and a radar dish
Easy access – Flip up the top panels to reveal the interior, which includes a removable throne for Darth Jar Jar, a command centre, hyperdrive and more
Fun Star Wars gift for kids – This LEGO Star Wars Starship set makes a great birthday gift for 10+ year old boys, girls and adult Star Wars fans
Part of the LEGO Star Wars: Rebuild the Galaxy collection – Look out for 75388 Jedi Bob’s Starfighter and 75393 TIE Fighter & X-Wing Mash-up (sets, sold separately)
Collectible building toys for all ages – LEGO Star Wars sets enable kids and adult Star Wars fans to recreate classic scenes, create their own adventures or simply display the buildable models
description: From the manufacturer Buildable starship toy Cool LEGO Star Wars set to rebuild the galaxy! Turn the LEGO Star Wars universe upside down with this kids’ set featuring the Dark Falcon, a dark starship inspired by the Millennium Falcon, as seen in the LEGO Star Wars: Rebuild the Galaxy Disney+ 4-part special. Unlimited play possibilities Create exciting new adventures The Dark Falcon has all the cool features that fans know and love from the Millennium Falcon, but with Darth Jar Jar, Bounty Hunter C-3PO, Darth Dev and Darth Rey in control, anything could happen! Previous page Easy access Fold out the top panels to view the detailed interior. Entertainment area Relax and play games with Darth Dev, Darth Rey and Darth Jar Jar. Removable cockpit Navigate to the destination with 2 LEGO Star Wars minifigures in the cockpit. Removable throne Who will claim the throne on the Dark Falcon? Jail cell Help Jedi Vader rescue Beach Luke. Removable gunner post Keep watch from the gunner post with 2 LEGO Star Wars minifigures and operate the rotating cannons. Next page Ready for role play 6 LEGO Star Wars minifigures The set features Star Wars characters as you’ve never seen them before: Darth Jar Jar, Bounty Hunter C-3PO, Darth Dev, Darth Rey, Beach Luke and Jedi Vader, plus accessories including Lightsabers and a blue milk carton. Star Wars building sets Build your collection This building kit is part of a range of cool LEGO Star Wars sets (each sold separately) inspired by the LEGO Star Wars: Rebuild The Galaxy Disney+ special, which make top birthday gifts for kids and any Star Wars fans. TIE Fighter & X-Wing Mash-up Recreate the mash-up ‘TIE wing’ and ‘X-fighter’ from the LEGO Star Wars: Rebuild the Galaxy special and rebuild them into the iconic TIE fighter and X-wing.
